lines.english: Lesson 22
lines.chinese: 第22课
lines.raw: Lesson 22 | 第22课

lines.english: Knowledge and progress
lines.chinese: 知识与进步
lines.raw: Knowledge and progress | 知识与进步

lines.english: In what two areas have people made no 'progress' at all?
lines.chinese: 人们在哪两个领域根本没有取得“进步”？
lines.raw: In what two areas have people made no 'progress' at all? | 人们在哪两个领域根本没有取得“进步”？

lines.english: Why does the idea of progress loom so large in the modern world?
lines.chinese: 为什么进步的观念在现代世界如此重要？
lines.raw: Why does the idea of progress loom so large in the modern world? | 为什么进步的观念在现代世界如此重要？

lines.english: Surely because progress of a particular kind is actually taking place around us
lines.chinese: 当然是因为某种特定的进步确实正在我们身边发生
lines.raw: Surely because progress of a particular kind is actually taking place around us | 当然是因为某种特定的进步确实正在我们身边发生

lines.english: Although mankind has undergone no general improvement in intelligence or morality,
lines.chinese: 尽管人类在智力或道德方面没有取得普遍的进步，
lines.raw: Although mankind has undergone no general improvement in intelligence or morality, | 尽管人类在智力或道德方面没有取得普遍的进步，

lines.english: it has made extraordinary progress in the accumulation of knowledge.
lines.chinese: 但在知识积累方面取得了非凡的进步。
lines.raw: it has made extraordinary progress in the accumulation of knowledge. | 但在知识积累方面取得了非凡的进步。

lines.english: Knowledge began to increase as soon as the thoughts of one individual
lines.chinese: 知识的增长始于个体思想
lines.raw: Knowledge began to increase as soon as the thoughts of one individual | 知识的增长始于个体思想

lines.english: could be communicated to another by means of speech.
lines.chinese: 可以通过言语传达给另一个人。
lines.raw: could be communicated to another by means of speech. | 可以通过言语传达给另一个人。

lines.english: With the invention of writing, a great advance was made,
lines.chinese: 随着书写的发明，取得了巨大的进步，
lines.raw: With the invention of writing, a great advance was made, | 随着书写的发明，取得了巨大的进步，

lines.english: for knowledge could then be not only communicated but also stored.
lines.chinese: 因为知识不仅可以交流，还可以储存。
lines.raw: for knowledge could then be not only communicated but also stored. | 因为知识不仅可以交流，还可以储存。

lines.english: Libraries made education possible, and education in its turn added to libraries:
lines.chinese: 图书馆使教育成为可能，而教育反过来又丰富了图书馆：
lines.raw: Libraries made education possible, and education in its turn added to libraries: | 图书馆使教育成为可能，而教育反过来又丰富了图书馆：

lines.english: the growth of knowledge followed a kind of compound interest law,
lines.chinese: 知识的增长遵循了一种复利法则，
lines.raw: the growth of knowledge followed a kind of compound interest law, | 知识的增长遵循了一种复利法则，

lines.english: which was greatly enhanced by the invention of printing.
lines.chinese: 印刷术的发明极大地促进了这一进程。
lines.raw: which was greatly enhanced by the invention of printing. | 印刷术的发明极大地促进了这一进程。

lines.english: All this was comparatively slow until, with the coming of science,
lines.chinese: 所有这些都相对缓慢，直到科学的到来，
lines.raw: All this was comparatively slow until, with the coming of science, | 所有这些都相对缓慢，直到科学的到来，

lines.english: the tempo was suddenly raised.
lines.chinese: 节奏突然加快。
lines.raw: the tempo was suddenly raised. | 节奏突然加快。

lines.english: Then knowledge began to be accumulated according to a systematic plan.
lines.chinese: 于是知识开始按照系统的计划积累。
lines.raw: Then knowledge began to be accumulated according to a systematic plan. | 于是知识开始按照系统的计划积累。

lines.english: The trickle became a stream: the stream has now become a torrent.
lines.chinese: 涓涓细流汇成小溪：小溪现在已变成洪流。
lines.raw: The trickle became a stream: the stream has now become a torrent. | 涓涓细流汇成小溪：小溪现在已变成洪流。

lines.english: Moreover, as soon as new knowledge is acquired, it is now turned to practical account.
lines.chinese: 此外，一旦获得新知识，它现在就会被付诸实践。
lines.raw: Moreover, as soon as new knowledge is acquired, it is now turned to practical account. | 此外，一旦获得新知识，它现在就会被付诸实践。

lines.english: What is called 'modern civilization'
lines.chinese: 所谓的“现代文明”
lines.raw: What is called 'modern civilization' | 所谓的“现代文明”

lines.english: is not the result of a balanced development of all man's nature,
lines.chinese: 并非人类所有本性平衡发展的结果，
lines.raw: is not the result of a balanced development of all man's nature, | 并非人类所有本性平衡发展的结果，

lines.english: but of accumulated knowledge applied to practical life.
lines.chinese: 而是积累的知识应用于实际生活的结果。
lines.raw: but of accumulated knowledge applied to practical life. | 而是积累的知识应用于实际生活的结果。

lines.english: The problem now facing humanity is:
lines.chinese: 人类现在面临的问题是：
lines.raw: The problem now facing humanity is: | 人类现在面临的问题是：

lines.english: What is going to be done with all this knowledge?
lines.chinese: 所有这些知识将如何利用？
lines.raw: What is going to be done with all this knowledge? | 所有这些知识将如何利用？

lines.english: As is so often pointed out, knowledge is a two-edged weapon
lines.chinese: 正如人们常指出的，知识是一把双刃剑
lines.raw: As is so often pointed out, knowledge is a two-edged weapon | 正如人们常指出的，知识是一把双刃剑

lines.english: which can be used equally for good or evil.
lines.chinese: 既可以用于善，也可以用于恶。
lines.raw: which can be used equally for good or evil. | 既可以用于善，也可以用于恶。

lines.english: It is now being used indifferently for both.
lines.chinese: 它现在被不加区分地同时用于两者。
lines.raw: It is now being used indifferently for both. | 它现在被不加区分地同时用于两者。

lines.english: Could any spectacle, for instance, be more grimly whimsical
lines.chinese: 比如，还有什么景象比这更令人感到残酷又荒诞呢？
lines.raw: Could any spectacle, for instance, be more grimly whimsical | 比如，还有什么景象比这更令人感到残酷又荒诞呢？

lines.english: than that of gunners using science to shatter men's bodies
lines.chinese: 炮兵利用科学来摧毁人的身体，
lines.raw: than that of gunners using science to shatter men's bodies | 炮兵利用科学来摧毁人的身体，

lines.english: while, close at hand, surgeons use it to restore them?
lines.chinese: 而身边的外科医生却利用科学来修复他们？
lines.raw: while, close at hand, surgeons use it to restore them? | 而身边的外科医生却利用科学来修复他们？

lines.english: We have to ask ourselves very seriously
lines.chinese: 我们必须非常严肃地问自己
lines.raw: We have to ask ourselves very seriously | 我们必须非常严肃地问自己

lines.english: what will happen if this twofold use of knowledge,
lines.chinese: 如果知识的这种双重用途，
lines.raw: what will happen if this twofold use of knowledge, | 如果知识的这种双重用途，

lines.english: with its ever-increasing power, continues.
lines.chinese: 及其不断增长的力量，继续下去，将会发生什么。
lines.raw: with its ever-increasing power, continues. | 及其不断增长的力量，继续下去，将会发生什么。
